name: Kaspersky Threat Intelligence Portal
description: Integrate with Kaspersky Threat Intelligence Portal (OpenTIP) to look up file hashes, IP addresses, domains, and URLs for threat verdicts and context

auth_config.note: API token generated at opentip.kaspersky.com/token. Can also be set as OPENTIP_APIKEY environment variable.

actions.name: Lookup File Hash
actions.description: Look up a file hash (MD5, SHA-1, or SHA-256) in Kaspersky Threat Intelligence for verdict and malware classification

parameters.name: request
parameters.description: File hash to look up (MD5, SHA-1, or SHA-256)

actions.name: Lookup IP Address
actions.description: Look up an IPv4 address in Kaspersky Threat Intelligence for threat verdict and context

actions.name: Lookup Domain
actions.description: Look up a domain in Kaspersky Threat Intelligence for threat verdict, categories, and related data

actions.name: Lookup URL
actions.description: Look up a web address in Kaspersky Threat Intelligence for threat verdict and categorization

actions.name: Submit File for Analysis
actions.description: Submit a file to Kaspersky Sandbox for dynamic analysis and threat detection

actions.name: Get File Analysis Report
actions.description: Retrieve the full analysis report for a previously submitted or known file by hash

parameters.name: request
parameters.description: File hash (SHA-256 preferred) to retrieve report for
